title: 3 x Pan Aroma Lily & Jasmine Air Freshener Trigger Spray 250ml – Long-Lasting Floral Fragrance for Home & Office
features: 🌸 Delightful Lily & Jasmine Scent – A fresh and floral blend that fills your space with a soothing and uplifting aroma.
💦 Easy-to-Use Trigger Spray – Provides an even mist for effortless application and long-lasting fragrance.
🌬️ Instant Odor Elimination – Effectively neutralizes bad odors, leaving behind a light and refreshing floral scent.
🏡 Perfect for Any Room – Ideal for use in living rooms, bedrooms, bathrooms, offices, and more.
📦 Value Pack of 3 (750ml Total) – Get long-lasting freshness with this convenient multipack, perfect for daily use.
description: Product description Transform your home into a floral paradise with the Pan Aroma Lily & Jasmine Air Freshener Trigger Spray. This air freshener delivers a delicate yet refreshing blend of lily and jasmine, creating a calm and inviting atmosphere in any space. The trigger spray design ensures easy application with a fine mist that evenly spreads the fragrance. With this pack of 3 (750ml total), you can enjoy continuous freshness and eliminate unwanted odors effortlessly. Perfect for use in homes, offices, bathrooms, and more, simply spray for an instant boost of floral freshness. ✨ Refresh your space with the elegant scent of lily and jasmine! ✨ Ingredients Spray
